supabase/schema.sql.description: Existing notifications table already exists with basic structure (id, user_id, title, message, type, is_read, link). Need to extend with multi-channel support.

src/types/database.ts.description: TypeScript database types are manually defined (not auto-generated). Notifications table type exists. Uses Supabase patterns with Row/Insert/Update types.

src/lib/supabase.ts.description: Supabase client exports: supabase (anon), supabaseAdmin (service role). Use supabaseAdmin for server-side operations that bypass RLS.

supabase/migrations/001_notification_enu.description: Created notification system enums migration file. Defines notification_channel (email, push, sms, in_app) and notification_status (pending, sent, delivered, failed, read) enums following the DROP IF EXISTS CASCADE pattern from schema.sql
